info.name: HRMS Passport Visa and Recruitment Masters CRUD
info.description: CRUD, activation, dropdown, and filter tests for /api/masters/passport-visa/ and /api/masters/recruitment/. Set base_url, access_token or run login, and company_id before running company-scoped recruitment requests.
